name: Uninsured GEO provider—can I still recover?
description: Target assets/judgment; settle likely.[1] Asset check first.

mainEntity.name: Uninsured GEO provider—can I still recover?

acceptedAnswer.text: Target assets/judgment; settle likely.[1] Asset check first.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, pursue personal assets or business judgment if viable; many settle to protect.** Check entity status.[1]

Pierce veil if fraud.[1] Phoenix firms face this.

**Key factors:**
- LLC protections limited.
- Personal guarantees.
- Asset search.
- Bankruptcy risk.

Hire PI for assets pre-suit. Judgment-proof? Write off or garnish.
